you want get better making delicious BBQ? You will have the opportunity, put this your calendar now. Thursday, September 22nd join World Class BBQ Champion, Tony Balay from Lonestar Smoke Rangers. will teaching beginner level class for everyone who wants get better with their culinary skills.

Discussion 'Mac Lion (10.7)' started axboi87, Jan 20, 2012.
I've got 500gb internal drive and 240gb SSD.
When trying restore using disk utility i'm given the error "Not enough space disk ____ restore"
But shouldn't have that!!!
Any ideas workarounds before resorting the above?
Use Carbon Copy Cloner copy one drive the other. I've done this several times going from larger HDD smaller SSD and wound with bootable SSD drive. One step you have remember not skip use Disk Utility partition the SSD GUID partition scheme HFS+ before doing the clone. came Apple Partition Scheme, even you let CCC the clone, the resulting drive won't bootable. CCC usually works "file mode" and can easily copy larger drive (that's mostly empty) onto smaller drive. you tell CCC clone drive you did NOT boot from, can work block copy mode where the destination drive must the same size larger than the drive you are cloning from (if recall).
I've actually done this somehow Disk Utility several times (booting from different drive (or even the dvd) not running disk utility from the drive your cloning) and had work just fine from larger smaller bootable clone. Definitely format the drive cloning first, bootable Apple etc..
Thanks for pointing this out. only experience using larger smaller was when was trying make Lion install stick and was unable restore InstallESD.dmg USB stick but course the reason that wouldn't fit there was slightly more than data.

Sysco Corp. has terminated its planned $3.5 billion takeover Foods, announced Monday, after federal judge blocked the combination. The company opting instead add billion its stock-buyback program.
With the deal breaking up, Sysco will pay $300 million termination fee Foods and $12.5 million fee Performance Food Group, which had agreed buy some Foods facilities. Sysco, based Houston, plans make the share repurchases over the next two years.
Rosemont, Illinois-based Foods operates major distribution center Fishers. Sysco has large warehouse 4000 62nd St., Indianapolis.
Sysco had fought for more than year gain government approval for the transaction, which antitrust regulators said would hurt competition and lead higher prices. Sysco and Foods dominate market known broadline foodservice, which supplies school cafeterias, restaurants and hotels. Sysco had argued that the acquisition would bring billion savings, letting offer lower prices customers.
Investors have responded with relief the deal's demise, reflecting concerns about the company undertaking ambitious merger. Sysco shares rose 3.1 percent the day the transaction was halted U.S. District Judge Amit Mehta, and the stock climbed again Monday morning after the merger was withdrawn.
Mehta blocked the merger June when granted Federal Trade Commission request delay the transaction. The FTC had sued the companies February, saying the deal would give Sysco oversized share industry where it's already the biggest player.
arguments before Mehta May, the two sides clashed over the scope the market which the companies compete. Sysco and Foods argued that the commission was relying "tortured" analysis, ignoring the variety distribution channels available customers.
Sysco said Monday that weighed embarking appeal but decided against it.
Shares Sysco rose much 1.6 percent $39 early trading. The stock had slid 3.3 percent this year through the end last week.

"Bake pie away," I've literally had son say that few times. So, what was except fulfilling his demand? Baking (not only pies), cooking method where tools actually make the man, which means that very hard nearly impossible successfully without proper bakeware.
With years experience under belt, I've learned about and discovered what truly matters when looking for bakeware buy, and going teach you later the article.
Also, have reviewed what believe the best five non-stick bakeware sets out there, make sure check them out you are search one.
The first and most obvious reason because food doesn't stick it! not want sound overly simplistic, but any chef (or mom, matter fact) knows that pans that stick will absolutely mess the outcome.
People normally solve this problem oiling up, but don't like since makes the food greasy. Using non-stick bakeware healthier, more convenient, and more practical way baking.
The next thing that you might not have known that non-stick bakeware much easier clean than more conventional types. no-brainer really nothing sticks the surface then there won't anything scrub, scrape wash off.
This trait right here will save you tons time well frustration, and might motivate you bake more often because the hassle-free cleaning process. Just make sure maintain the bakeware.
Lastly, even heat distribution another thing that you should look for, and this type bakeware enables it.
Here's the deal: heat distribution most likely won't affect the quality the result, but will make the bakeware heat more quickly which will ultimately decrease the cooking time.
Investing little bit time into research can save you lot money and trouble the long run, and that why you need read this section carefully.
Bakeware sets differ regarding materials, abilities, cost, and maintenance, learning about some general features these products will help you decide which type will fulfill your demands.
Bakeware can made from different kinds materials including iron, glass, copper, steel, etc.
Today will mention only the types that are related products reviewed this article.
important know that each material yields different cooking properties study these paragraphs find out which one right for you.
Carbon steel this material light, durable, and reacts temperature changes very quickly, meaning that can heat fast. Even though lightweight, bit heavier than copper and doesn't retain heat well iron. It's good choice for baking meats, veggies, bread, and cakes.
Copper excellent heat conductor and doesn't need pre-heating since gets hot very quickly. Very light, but also quite expensive compared other bakeware materials. Also, isn't the best choice for recipes that require baking under very high heat.
Silicon good for foods where sticking issue, such breads, cookies, and cakes. light, affordable and dishes will slide out easily. The one downside that can frustrating wash because elastic, but luckily, most the silicon bakeware dishwasher safe.
Since you'll buying entire set products, would good idea find one that suitable for all kinds baking jobs. Make sure that all the basic items such pie pan, muffin pan, loaf pan, cookie sheet, cake pan, whatever you need, included the package.
This feature that most folks overlook, and makes world difference when comes handling the pan. It's easy move the dish around when it's cold but taking out scorching hot oven different story (trust me, know). You'll try cautious not burn your fingers easy not pay attention the contents the pan which can lead spillage and messy kitchen.
Look for bakeware that has nice, ergonomic handles handling areas. Some models have silicon added these parts for extra protection and ease use.
Not all types bakeware can withstand the same temperatures; matter fact, this trait greatly differs from product product. Certain pans are oven safe 500 degrees Fahrenheit, while others cannot take more than 350.
This significant difference pay close attention this detail when buying set.
Now, let's get into the meaty part this article the reviews.
After trying out many sets, I've reached some conclusions and decided put together list favorite ones.
Keep mind that these are personal choices, but they are also top rated products.
Rachel Ray world-renowned chef and personality, and her famous Cucina line products never fails deliver. Here, are dealing with excellent, 10-piece set that personally think very highly of.
The material that this bakeware made carbon steel, and the non-stick, latte-colored coating looks very pretty and does the job well.
thing that didn't like about the construction this set that everything bulky. not huge issue, but folks who lack storage space will not thrilled with these products.
far items are concerned, the set includes two loaf pans, two cake pans, two cookie sheets, two pie plates, muffin tin, and plastic cake pan topper.
opinion, this more than enough, but I'm sure some folks are going disappointed because there's pizza pan included.
The handles have silicon grips attached them, and this big bonus when comes practicality and handling. Also, the rolled edges allow you grab the pan more easily and move around securely.
The pan can withstand heat 450 and think that this should sufficient for most baking jobs. Make sure not over this temperature because you could burn the pans.
Copper has gained lot popularity the cooking world over the last few years, and honestly, can only say good things about it. Copper Chef known for plethora cookware, and now are taking look their baking set.
I've mentioned before, copper fantastic heat conductor, and the heat distribution this material even gets.
Personally, find the latter feature very important because like have consistency cooking.
This 12-piece set that consists 12-cup muffin pan, cookie sheet, loaf pan, square pan, and eight pieces silicon ramekin cups with lids.
Ok, think bit unfair for company advertise set twelve copper products while only four them are actually made this material. While the ramekin cups are lovely, they seem cheap filler this set.
far handling concerned, most the products this pack not have handles, you have rely the rolled edges for gripping. This big disadvantage opinion, and greatly handicaps the ease use.
These black, sturdy-looking baking dishes remind old-school bakeware sets that people used bake with few decades ago. However, this modern and versatile set that should fulfill most your demands.
The ChefLand set made carbon steel; looks pretty plain but has non-stick coating that's quite effective. One thing that this material good even heat distribution, you won't need worry about hotspots.
The products are dishwasher safe, however, after several months kind cleaning, some items started form rust the outer edges, which big minus. would recommend washing them hand.
When comes the items, ChefLand's set includes roasting pan, round pizza pan, large and medium cookie sheet, two round cake pans, square cake pan, loaf pan, oven crisper pan, and 12-cup muffin pan. far I'm concerned this set has everything covered!
Most the dishes have handles them, and even those which don't, have nice grip area that allows for good handling.
Unfortunately, there silicon padding protective surface you will need use gloves cloth.
This bakeware set comes from Sunbeam; bit smaller set terms the number items it, but worthy addition today's list. Oh, forgot mention it's cheap chips!
The material these pans are made carbon steel, and its non-stick features are achieved with xylan coating interior and exterior. The black color gives pretty plain, non-exciting look, but personally not mind this.
The Sunbeam set has only 5-pieces, which significantly less than other sets reviewed today. The dishes included are loaf pan, cookie sheet, 6-cup muffin pan, and two round cake pans.
One disadvantage this set that cannot handle temperatures higher than 400 which quite limiting because some recipes require more heat.
All the pans have handles enough room grab them properly and handle safely.
Now was reading some online commentary, many people complained that pans arrived dented bent when they ordered them, this might issue.
haven't experienced this myself, just want put out warning.
This set differs from others reviewed today because the only one that's not made metal.
Boxiki Kitchen brings this 3-piece silicone set that bread and cake lovers might find interesting.
I've said, these products are made silicone which has its pros and cons.
The good thing that food will just slide out it, but might irritating when trying wash hand because it's bendy. lot people raise concerns about chemicals this material, you'll glad know that this set FDA approved and non-toxic.
The set comes with three items round cake pan, square brownie pan, and banana bread/meatloaf pan.
All the dishes are equipped with metal handles which allows for nice and solid grip, you won't have worry about the pans slipping out your hands.
Silicone generally oven safe 500 degrees which fantastic and much better than some metal products, you won't need worry about burning your bakeware.
However, the metal handles don't seem take high temperatures very well, and I've heard some reports them flaking and bubbling 400
hope that the article was helpful and that got you acquainted with the basics bakeware.
Now, the time has come for declare top pick the day, and the product that got most sympathies Rachel Ray's 10-piece Cucina Set.
Its beautiful design what attracted this bakeware set, but the excellent performance made even stronger impression.
Non-stick surface does its job flawlessly, and the carbon steel construction sturdy and strong.
This very good list, have tested myself the Rachel Ray's 10-Piece Cucina Bakeware Set and i'm satisfied with it, fulfill most daily cooking.

Are film trailers spoiling movies?
April asked high ticket prices were ruining your visits the cinema. Yes, you said overwhelmingly. But something else has put strain relationship with the cinema and it's not the popcorn.
Have you ever gone your local cinema watch new film only feel you've seen before? know have. ‘Spoilerific' film trailers are now often detailed seems hardly worth watching the movie itself.
Imagine the trailer for Casablanca told you whether Ingrid Bergman went off with Humphrey Bogart Paul Henreid the end. the trailer for Citizen Kane revealed just what the dying man meant when muttered the word ‘Rosebud'.
And seems that even some film directors agree. Colin Trevorrow, director new film, Jurassic World, has said think that trailers have shown far more the film than would have wanted.
the last couple months, I've paid £17.50 ticket see two films I've been anticipating for some time. £17.50 sounds steep, but that was for iMAX and I'd still have paid more than £10 for ‘normal' ticket.
But left the cinema unfulfilled, because felt like I'd seen them both six months before.
both cases the trailer revealed the entire structure the story, key plot twists and expensive action sequences. Throw few character deaths for good measure and you've got the basis significant chunk what you've paid your money for.
really did feel cheated what the studio had wanted see advance.
this just modern trend? checked out trailers for 1981's Raiders the Lost Ark, and 1964's Goldfinger get bigger picture.
Both revealed some well-known scenes (including Goldfinger's iconic laser and dialogue), but the plot basics were instead explained voiceover, rather than any especially huge visual giveaways.
Besides, the chance actually seeing these trailers was significantly lessened due the technology available the time release. Which got thinking further.
‘If you don't like it, don't watch it', hear you cry. wish were that simple. the age the internet, exposure has increased tenfold.
Marketing campaigns target social media and television, while the days simple poster are gone. Why commission still image when you can display scenes from the film screen station other public place?
Not only that, but trailers are also forced upon you the cinema itself before other films. Without blindfold and soundproof booth hide you have little choice.
It's not that have problem with marketing and ads. But they're spoiling the experience. don't want see all the best bits wrapped into two minutes, six months ahead release.
Have you had film spoiled its trailer/marketing? Hollywood revealing too much desperate attempt put bums seats?
ticket prices ruin your film-going experience?
Something George mentioned earlier about Terminator trailer jogged memory about another film from the same franchise, Terminator Genisys.
promote the film, trailer had been released that included major plot twist ACTUALLY the trailer. Now, had heard about this trailer and had been purposely avoiding it. However, even when you try avoid spoilers, sometimes it's out your control. When went see Mad Max, they showed the afore-mentioned trailer and before realised, was too late. cannot unseen.
Even the director, Alan Taylor, was unhappy about the spoilers the trailer.
Genisys was [spoiler alert] ..... indeed half the inspiration for this convo. saw that article about Alan Taylor's thoughts the other day, but could only sympathise much the film was, opinion, travesty.
Have you seen the film now Ryan? what did you think the big ‘reveal'? For film that had very little else going for that really did completely spoil the experience for me.
just can't understand why that decision was taken. You don't need resort something like that generate interest said twist that good then word mouth will spread.
For anyone interested, the trailer for the new Bond film was released today.

UNStudio has joined forces with HPP Architects create consortium (UNS HPP) carry out the next phases their winning project the architectural design competition for FOUR Frankfurt. Take look the complete story after the jump.
From the architects: The centrally located 16,000 square meter site was purchased Groß Partner real estate development company who will carrying out the development the project back 2015. Situated the very core the city, the site has been completely inaccessible for the last years. Now four new high-rise towers will change Frankfurt's skyline from the air, while cultivating its liveliness the ground. The development these towers, reaching heights 228 meters, will open new streets create multi-use, vibrant inner-city quarter, bringing together healthy mix work, living, relaxation and recreation.
The choice programmes allows for smooth transition from Frankfurt's shopping district the east Roßmarkt, the high-rise office towers clustered around Park Taunusanlage. With development concept that unique Europe, the FOUR Frankfurt project brings together facilities that will establish lively new neighbourhood for Frankfurt, its visitors, and its (future) residents.
The new high-rise complex will integrated into the expanding city structure incorporating the heritage-listed facades the Junghofstraße into the design and making multi-storey base building the connecting element the entire site.
According the assessment the competition jury, the unique quality the quarter can found its public development and amenity value. The new development will therefore create connected spaces, accessible rooftops, pathways and passages. The existing block the Junghofstraße will opened strengthen the surrounding pathways and ensure high level accessibility. This will create multi-use, diverse quarter comprising 50% office spaces, 30% living accommodation (including subsidized housing), addition retail spaces, restaurants and hotels.
Four Frankfurt expected completed 2023.

Students are shouting several slogans guarantee the school's autonomy front Jogyesa Temple.
April 15th, 2016, the General Student Council and Student Council Postgraduate held the 4.15 Jogye rally. The rally was also held the last year with the same objectives. Goals the rally are criticize Jogye Order for its responsibility Dongguk University's present conflicts related President Han Tae-sik (Bogwang) and guarantee the school's autonomy from the order.
11:00 A.M., approximately 200 people, about 150 Donggukians and people who are related Dongguk University, gathered together Manhae Hall. soon the march began, the marchers were obstructed police officers because cow, which was prepared the GSC, was not reported participate the rally. Scuffles broke out between the police and the GSC, and the cow was not able with the marchers. The parade was started from Chungmu-ro where Dongguk University located, passed Myeong-dong and finally Jogyesa Temple.
After several speeches from students, the GSC and the gathered students tried deliver request proposal Jogye Order together, but police officers blocked the way. Therefore, only ten representatives were allowed deliver the request proposal the persons concerned the Jogye Order the temple gate. The request proposal involves following three demands: Jogye Order has stop intervening the school matters and should guarantee the school's autonomy, every sunim who spoiled the school needs apologize and resign, and board directors should reformed more democratic way.

Quartz one the most common and varied minerals earth, and its abundant colors produce many gemstone types. Amethyst and Citrine are the most popular and valuable gem varieties Quartz, but other forms also make important gemstones. Chalcedony describes any form Quartz that microcrystalline, compact form without any visible crystals. Chalcedony also has several varieties used gemstones, most notably Agate, Carnelian, Tiger's Eye, and Chrysoprase.
Pure Quartz, which also known Rock Crystal, colorless. Various impurities are responsible for the extensive range colors. The main crystalline Quartz varieties used gemstones are described below.
Amethyst, the purple variety, the most popular and valuable Quartz gemstone. Amethyst ranges from light dark purple. See the Amethyst gemstone page for more details.
Citrine the yellow, orange, reddish-brown variety Quartz. usually colored heat treatment Amethyst Smoky Quartz. Light yellow lemon yellow Citrine often called Lemon Quartz the gem trade. See the Citrine gemstone page for more details.
Smoky Quartz the brown "smoky" variety Quartz. ranges color from light brown black. Despite its dark color, rarely opaque. See the Smoky Quartz gemstone page for more details.
The rosy pink variety Quartz known Rose Quartz, and its color usually soft, ranging from very light pink medium pink intensity. Rose Quartz often milky hazy, and may lack good transparency. See the Rose Quartz gemstone page for more details.
The colorless, transparent variety Quartz, free any impurities, known "Rock Crystal". Flawless and very large cuts may cut from Rock Crystal.
Milky Quartz the white, translucent opaque variety Quartz. Though very common nature, not used gemstone.
Colorless Quartz with golden yellow Rutile inclusions, hairlike growths within the gemstone, are known Rutilated Quartz. See the Rutilated Quartz gemstone page for more details.
Ametrine interesting, color-zoned combination purple Amethyst and brownish-yellow Citrine. See the Ametrine gemstone page for more details.
Prasiolite, Green Quartz, describes light green Quartz artificially colored heat treatment certain types Amethyst. May also called "Green Amethyst" some jewelers.
The blue variety Quartz, which uncommon nature, seldom used gemstone. Most "Blue Quartz" clear Rock Crystal irradiated with gold from deep sky blue color. Blue Quartz may also refer dull grayish-blue Quartz massive form with Crocidolite inclusions.
Colorless Quartz with Tourmaline inclusions, often thin long black crystals, known "Tourmalinated Quartz".
Cat's Eye Quartz Quartz with dense, tiny Rutile inclusions that cause cat's eye effect. not common, and the chatoyant effect usually weak. Cat's Eye Quartz usually grayish color and translucent.
All forms Quartz are used gemstones, and they are all affordable. They are cut into various gemstone cuts and cabochons, and used all forms jewelry. Lesser quality stones are often tumbled for use bracelets, necklaces, and costume jewelery. Large spheres and carvings are also cut from all the Quartz forms. Due its abundance and lack luster, Rock Crystal not commonly cut into gemstones, although some very large spheres and sculptures are carved from it. Small crystals Rock Crystal are sometime worn pendants, sometimes being polished and smoothed, and sometimes their entirely natural crystal form.
Varieties specific Amethyst, Citrine, Smoky Quartz, Rose Quartz, Rutilated Quartz, and Chalcedony are listed separately.
Amethyst Purple variety Quartz, and its most popular and valuable gemstone variety.) Tumbled Amethyst with white Milky Quartz sometimes known Amethyst Quartz.
Aventurine Opaque, compact Quartz Chalcedony containing small Mica, Hematite, Goethite scales which cause glistening effect. Aventurine most often green but may also other colors such gray, orange, and brown.
Blue Quartz Rare natural blue variety Quartz. caused inclusions blue minerals, especially Dumortierite. Most "Blue Quartz" what popularly known "Aqua Aura", essentially clear Rock Crystal synthetically irradiated with gold form deep sky blue color.
 Cat's Eye Quartz not common, and the chatoyant effect usually weak.
Lemon Quartz Lemon Quartz light dark yellow Citrine, distinguished from most Citrine lacking orange, brown, reddish tints. More often though clear Quartz that irradiated produce intensely colored yellow gemstone. Lemon Quartz has recently experienced popularity increase the gemstone market.
Milky Quartz White, translucent opaque variety Quartz. not commonly used gemstone.
Prase Light emerald green, transparent translucent Quartz Chalcedony, with coloring caused from inclusions green minerals, such Actinolite, Hedenbergite, Chlorite, Malachite.
Prasiolite Light green gem form Quartz artificially colored heat treatment certain types Amethyst.
Rock Crystal The colorless, transparent variety Quartz, free impurities called "Rock Crystal".
Tourmalinated Quartz Quartz with splintery Tourmaline inclusions.
Amethyst may heat treated deepen the purple color. Most gem Citrine produced heat treating Amethyst, and the green Quartz known Prasiolite "Green Amethyst" also produced heating Amethyst from specific localities.
Certain colorful Quartz types not found nature are produced through irradiation. Some forms Quartz with multicolored rainbow effect are synthetically treated produce their color effect using film deposition. The process involves bonding extremely thin metallic film layer over the top the gemstone, that the interesting color effects are reflected from the crown. Some vividly colorful forms Quartz are synthetic grown using the hydrothermal method.
Quartz extremely common and found numerous localities throughout the world. The important sources are far too numerous mention, though general the most prolific countries that produce Quartz gemstones are Brazil, Madagascar, India, and the U.S. (Arkansas). Specific sources for the popular Quartz varieties are described their dedicated pages.
See the individual variety pages for specific variety similarities.
Rock crystal similar glass, but the softness glass usually lends scratches and soft etches which are lacking Rock Crystal. Rock Crystal rarely cut into small facets, usually not concern confusion other colorless gems such Diamond, White Topaz, and White Sapphire. These white gemstones will also have greater dispersion and exhibit more fire.
Additional images for the varieties Amethyst, Citrine, Smoky Quartz, Rose Quartz, Rutilated Quartz, and Chalcedony are listed separately.

full time vegan, poet, artist and woman.
Frontal and thorough when inspired.
Our memories: childhood memories, the language dearly speak and nature's colorful and tasteful palette are constant and renewable source wonder and inspiration.
just getting through finishing two special orders Xocolate Bears new edition, which are going Costa Rica. Both orders are reconnecting with childhood friends and grade school teachers.
sell projects Etsy. local shops and our hometown San Jose, Costa Rica Tienda Eñé shop supporting local indie and urban designers, artisans and artists.
Handmade over mass production, and over all those other products largely available. Handmade choice keep our creative and critical side active, balance and renovate while innovating ourselves every day. Handmade more legacy and tradition worth the while take back and pass down, its techniques connected our earlier days and years. The things made, the stuff broke. Handmade the milestones will all like share. Going back and supporting handmade will keep creativity edge and sharp.
